title: Queue commons ANTHROPIC_API_KEY bug to NightOwl

log.context: Queue commons ANTHROPIC_API_KEY bug to NightOwl

Both completed. Here's the summary:

**Issue #146 — fix: commons-server audition needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY**

The commons-server persona audition system is broken because no `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is set in the service environment. The fallback to the `claude` CLI doesn't work from systemd services since there's no OAuth context available. This causes auditions to fail after 3 attempts with a spawn error.

The fix requires jaboostin (infra owner) to add `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...` to `/mnt/data/te...(truncated)
